{#- Override of ablog/postnavy.html — renders prev/next navigation at the bottom of each post as two card-style links. -#} {% set post = ablog[pagename] %} {% if post.published and ablog.post_show_prev_next and (post.prev or post.next) %}
{% if post.prev %} ← Previous {{ post.prev.title }} {% else %} {% endif %} {% if post.next %} Next → {{ post.next.title }} {% else %} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
